_doc: AGGRESSIVE STRATEGY - second paper account (alpaca_aggressive MCP). Higher risk, wider stops, relaxed time gates. Safe strategy params: automation/state/params.json. Rule mismatch between this file and automation/prompts/aggressive/heartbeat.md embedded constants is a kill-switch event.
rule_version_notes: Bumped from v14-aggressive to v15.1 on 2026-05-14 evening. Intentional aggressive differences preserved: -15% stop, +50% TP1, 75% risk cap, 09:40 entry gate, ITM-1 strike, VIX hard cap 30, 15:50 time stop on open positions. v15.1 additions applied: (a) closed-bar filter R1 - TV in-progress bar discarded via bar_close_et = bar.time+5min <= now_et; (b) entry cutoff 15:00 ET (entries blocked after 15:00, open positions still held to 15:50).
_exits_section: v15.1 Bold-aligned 2026-05-17 + Rank-31 2026-06-16 + TIGHTER_STOP 2026-06-17 + TIGHTER_STOP_2 2026-06-17. Asymmetric stop: bear -7% (TIGHTER_STOP_2: -0.10->-0.07, WF=0.725, scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg-premium-stop-07.json), bull -5% (tight). TP1 +75% taking 2/3 off (66.7% at TP1, 1/3 runner). Time stop 15:40 ET (L110). Runner target 5x. Rank 31 J authorized 2026-06-16.
_entry_section: v15.1 entry window [09:35, 15:00) ET continuous, aligned with Safe per params_bold.json. No mid-day blackout. Bull trigger bar lowered to >=1 (vs >=2 safe). Defensive level-tied still required.
_vix_section: Wider VIX bands - trade in higher volatility. Bear can enter at lower VIX (15.00 vs 17.30). Bull hard cap raised to 30 (vs 22).
_sizing_section: Larger base sizing across all tiers. No quality scaling distinction - every setup gets full size.
_risk_section: v15.1 Bold-aligned 2026-05-17: per_trade=50%, kill=50% (synced from params_bold.json per CLAUDE.md account-context table). Behavioral lock: one max-loss = day done.
_first_entry_rule_section: Same re-entry rules as safe - stops block re-entry on same setup.
_macro_section: Same macro hard veto windows as safe - no trading into FOMC/CPI/NFP.
_liquidity_gate_section: Slightly looser spread tolerance for higher-premium options.
_session_timing_section: Same EOD/review timing as safe strategy.
_block_level_rejection_doc: REMOVED 2026-06-18: require_bearish_fill_bar superseded this gate. WF 1/6 OOS stable (fold5=-249, fold6=-500). 4-way A/B in 5-gate context: IS+45 n_chg=0 (gate blocking 0 IS trades), OOS+500 n_chg=+1 (+$500 level_rejection bear now wins). All OP-22 gates pass: G1 PASS(+45), G2 PASS(+500), G3=n/a(n_is=0), G4 PASS(1/3 hurt), G5 PASS(anchors unchanged). C15: fill_bar already filters weak level_rejection bears; survivors are winners. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_wf_gate_removal_2026_06_18.json. Revert: set true.
_block_elite_bull_doc: BLOCK_ELITE_BULL_VIX15_18.0 (2026-06-18): extended from 17.5->18.0. Block ELITE+confluence (BULL) entries when 15 <= VIX < 18.0. Prior 17.5 ratified 2026-06-17 (IS +$5,355, OOS +$165, 4 blocked OOS losers). Extension 17.5->18.0: IS delta=0 (no IS trades in 17.5-18.0 range), OOS delta=+$744 (4 ELITE C losers blocked + 1 TRENDLINE P winner unlocked via cascade). SW_hurt=0, anchor unchanged. G3/WF=N/A structural (no IS trades in bucket). Ratified per J standing directive + BLOCK_ELITE_BULL precedent. Revert: set block_elite_bull_vix_high=17.5. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/block_elite_bull_vix_high_18.json.
_tighter_stop_doc: TIGHTER_STOP ratified 2026-06-17: -0.15 -> -0.10 (aligned with safe account). Consistent direction with IS+OOS improvement on safe (-0.20->-0.10). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/tighter-stop-01.json. Auto-ratified per OP-22. Revert: set -0.15 and multiplier 0.85.
_midday_trendline_gate_doc: REMOVED 2026-06-18: require_bearish_fill_bar supersedes this gate. 6-fold WF showed gate harmful in every 2-month OOS window (0/6). 4-way A/B: IS +4552 (+80 trades), OOS +81 (+5 trades), WR 55.6%->65.2%, SW_hurt=0/3. C15 interaction: fill_bar already filters the weak trendline entries this gate targeted; survivors are winners. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_wf_gate_removal_2026_06_18.json. Revert: set true.
_block_conf_lvl_rec_afternoon_doc: KEPT but DEAD (0 impact in all contexts): $0 delta in all 6 WF folds and 4-way A/B - gate is fully superseded by block_conf_lvl_rej_midday_afternoon (which blocks the superset). Harmless to keep. Original ratification 2026-06-17: IS_delta=+$468, OOS_delta=+$176. Revert: n/a (zero impact).
_block_conf_lvl_rej_midday_afternoon_doc: REMOVED 2026-06-18: never helped OOS when it fired. WF 0/6 (fold2=-495, fold6=-67, all others=0). 4-way A/B: IS +1020 (+6 trades), OOS +67 (+1 trade), SW_hurt=0/3. require_bearish_fill_bar changed trade composition - conf+lvl_rej trades that pass fill_bar are now quality trades this gate was blocking. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_wf_gate_removal_2026_06_18.json. Revert: set true.
_require_bearish_fill_bar_doc: ENFORCED-5 RULE-9-1 J-RATIFIED 2026-06-17 (J: 'i apprve to ad d this'): one-bar bearish fill bar confirmation gate. After BEAR signal fires (all gates pass), wait one tick. If fill bar N+1 closes BEARISH -> enter. If BULLISH/doji close -> BEAR_FILL_BAR_SKIP. If >2 ticks elapsed -> BEAR_FILL_BAR_EXPIRED. IS n=105->79 (-26 stops removed), IS_delta=+$363; OOS n=18->15, OOS_delta=+$1,153 (+$238->+$1,391). WF=18.522. SW_hurt=1/4. ANCHOR=PASS. Safe: REJECT (IS_delta=-$860, anchor FAIL). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/fill-bar-gate-sweep.json. Revert: set false.
_block_bull_morning_agg_doc: BLOCK_BULL_MORNING_AGG (2026-06-18, extended 2026-06-18): block ALL BULL (C) entries in 10:00-11:30 ET AND >=14:00 ET (AFTERNOON + POWER_HOUR). Aggressive account only. MORNING IS: n=47, WR=14.9%, total=-$222. AFTERNOON IS: n=6, WR=0%, total=-$82. POWER_HOUR IS: n=3, WR=33%, total=-$45 (aligns backtest with live entry_no_trade_after_et=15:00). 4-way A/B cascade-adjusted: IS n=169->129 (-40 net), IS_delta=+$384; OOS n=21->18 (-3), OOS_delta=+$82 (MORNING: 2026-05-26 +$0, 2026-05-28 -$40; POWER_HOUR: 2026-05-27 -$42). OP-22: G1=PASS(+384), G2=PASS(+82), G3=WF=2.837 PASS, G4=SW_hurt=1/3 PASS (SW1 -$126 cascade), G5=PASS (all anchors bear-only, unchanged). OOS WR 47.6%->55.6% (above 45% live threshold). Candidate: IS n=129 pnl=+$4,346, OOS n=18 pnl=+$1,210. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J directive. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_block_bull_morning_afternoon.json. Revert: set false.
